description: Permission deny rules to prevent agents from reading sensitive files
codex_starlark_rules:
# Auto-generated deny rules for Codex CLI
prefix_rule(
    pattern = ["cat", ".env"],
    decision = "forbidden",
    justification = "Reading .env files is denied by policy"
)
prefix_rule(
    pattern = ["cat", "secrets/"],
    decision = "forbidden",
    justification = "Reading secrets directory is denied by policy"
)
prefix_rule(
    pattern = ["cat", "config/credentials.json"],
    decision = "forbidden",
    justification = "Reading credentials file is denied by policy"
)
